reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.8.9: fixes the real cause of unopenable exported PNGs. The culprit was Print As -> PNG (save_print_file), which still used a direct image.save() from v0.5.7 and was never covered by the earlier atomic-write fixes that targeted the wrong export path. Print As (PNG/JPEG/PDF) and the main canvas JPEG export now all write atomically with encode verification and readback, so a partial or externally-altered file can never be left behind.
